VehicleComponentParams.vehicleDescription:
Manufacturer: Anvil Aerospace
Focus: Heavy Fighter

Few vehicles employed by the proud men and women who serve in our Empire’s Navy inspire the awe of the legendary F8 Lightning. A force to be reckoned with, the F8 has secured Humanity’s freedom from numerous threats at home and abroad countless times.
